You embrace differences and help foster a safe working environment for yourself and your peers.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>The ROLE:</strong></p><p>Weâre looking for a social-first copywriter to support the editorial team.</p><p><br></p><p><em>Please note this is a part-time, freelance opportunity. </em></p><p><br></p><p><strong>What YOUâll do:</strong></p><p><u>Key priority:</u> write, edit, and collaborate with the team on all organic &amp; paid social copy including but not limited to:</p><ul><li>Organic captions and supers (when applicable) for all Milk social platforms</li><li>Reviewing assets with copy when available</li><li>Staying up to date on latest product positioning via check ins with the editorial team so that social copy always aligns to latest strategy + best practices</li><li>Check in with Editorial Director when copy needs to be reviewed + approved or to flag any questions or concerns</li><li>Working with the paid and DTC team to support their business needs including Demand Gen + PMAX Ad copy</li></ul><p><br></p><p><u>Secondary</u>: ad hoc, one off copy needs as they arise including brainstorming, product name ideation, etc</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Weâd like YOU to have:</strong></p><ul><li>Must be available Monday-Friday with a flexible hourly schedule based on team needs.</li><li>Flexible hours required, including occasional weekend availability to support the team during peak captioning periods</li><li>Max 20hrs a week.</li><li>Beauty experience a major plus</li></ul><p><br></p> copywriting, customer support, exec New York, New York, United States 2026-06-29T22:36:56+00:00 1134240 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-freelance-social-copywriter-milk-makeup-1134240 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Director of Service Marchay <strong>About Marchay<br><br></strong>Marchay is a curated, membership-based travel service and community for some of the world's most sophisticated travelers. Broadly recognized as one of the country's most elite luxury travel services. A key benefit of membership is dedicated, unbiased service from a highly experienced travel team. Marchay offers unlimited, bespoke trip planning and execution, access to pre-vetted private homes and villas, and preferred partner benefits at over 1,200 luxury hotels worldwide.<br><br><strong>Role Summary<br><br></strong>The Director of Service is responsible for leading Marchay's Service team and ensuring exceptional member experiences through strong leadership, performance management, training, and operational excellence. This role owns service team performance, member retention initiatives, service standards, escalation management, advisor development, and key industry relationships. The Director of Service serves as the senior leader for the Service team and partners closely with Membership, Operations, and Executive Leadership to support company growth, capacity planning, and organizational objectives.<br><br><strong>Core Responsibilities<br><br></strong><strong>Member Experience &amp; Service Excellence<br><br></strong><ul><li>Lead efforts to elevate the member experience across the Service team</li><li>Define, reinforce, and improve service standards to ensure a consistent, high-touch member experience</li><li>Identify service gaps and recommend improvements in partnership with leadership</li><li>Ensure adherence to service expectations and service level agreements (SLAs)</li><li>Support timely and seamless member onboarding and transitions in partnership with internal teams<br><br></li></ul><strong>Escalation Management<br><br></strong><ul><li>Serve as a senior point of contact for resolving complex member issues and service escalations</li><li>Manage both internal
